headline: Software Engineer
textMarkdown:
A quick tour of supported **markdown** formatting:

**Bold text** stands out clearly.
*Italic text* adds emphasis.
[Clickable links](https://example.com) render in LinkedIn blue.
#Hashtags are highlighted automatically.

You can combine them: **[bold link](https://example.com)** or *italic with #hashtag*.

Line breaks work with \n inside the JSON string.
